title: Frankston North

Roof Restoration Frankston North

Premium Roof Repairs & Restoration in Frankston North. Experience the Sandhurst Roofing difference. Sandhurst Roofing is proudly a family owned and operated business with over 30 years’ experience. Since being established Sandhurst Roofing has grown to become one of Melbourne’s leading roofing companies.

Our expert team take the time to discuss your specific requirements so that you constantly know what is happening every step of the roofing of guttering process. We offer quality workmanship and excellent customer service no matter what your roofing needs may be.

Get a Quote!

Quality Roof Repairs at a Competitive Price

If you have a terracotta tiled roof, a cement tiled roof, Colorbond roofing or a flat metal roof, our team will be able to help with your restoration or repair work. Sandhurst Roofing offer everything from roof repairs and restoration services, gutter repairs and installation, to the people of Frankston North. Better yet, our skilled team are experienced in working with all types of materials. All our services come fully licensed and insured, and every one of our tradespeople are registered roof tilers and roof plumbers, giving you peace of mind that your roof restoration or repairs will be of the highest possible standard. We give honest advice to the people of Frankston North, as well as giving you insight into the job at hand and a competitive quote. Is it time to experience the Sandhurst difference? Call us today. Gutter Repairs Frankston North

At Sandhurst Roofing, our team of roofers offer a variety of comprehensive services that will help you fulfil your individual guttering needs. With the knowledge that comes with over 30 years in the industry, we have the skill set required to create a well-engineered solution for any guttering issue. If you’re in need of gutter repairs, or thinking about replacing your current ones, give us a call on 0448 812 800, we will be more than happy to talk with you about you about your options.

Guttering is one of the most important parts of your roof, and your home. By carrying water away from the main structure of the house, they prevent mould growth, leaks, sagging, rotting and more. We pride ourselves on using only the highest quality products, that’s why your new gutters will be installed using COLORBOND® steel. COLORBOND® steel is one of the most durable materials, this means that not only will they do their job well, but they will last for years to come.
